title: Extra Select Gravy Bones Chicken Flavoured Dog Treat Biscuits in a 1ltr Bucket (approx 110 biscuits) (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
Enhance Their Learning: Ideal for both puppy training treats from 12 weeks and adult dog treats for training, making every session rewarding
Complementary Dog Treat: These dog bones have 10% protein and are great for all breeds, from dog treats for medium dogs to large dog treats.
Delightful Crunch: Crunchy dog biscuits treats that dogs adore; these dog gravy bones offer a satisfying crunch that's perfect as bedtime biscuits for dogs or a midday snack.
Chicken Flavour: Infused with chicken vitamins and minerals, these dog gravy bones biscuits offer a lighter flavour, each dog bone a delightful treat.
Resealable for Freshness: Each little bone will stay tasting delicious, and you can reuse the tub for other dog biscuits and treats, minimising waste.
description: Indications Crude Protein 10%, Crude Fat 7%, Crude Fibre 2.5%, Crude Ash Ingredients Cereals, Meat and Animal Derivatives (3% Poultry Meal), Oils and Fats, Derivatives of Vegetable, Derivatives of Vegetable Origin, Minerals, Various Sugars Directions Suitable for dogs over 12 weeks of age. Feed as a snack or reward at any time between meals. They also make a great training aid. To help maintain a balanced diet, adjust the amount given to keep your dog in a fit and healthy condition. Always provide fresh drinking water. See more

specifications_table.Storage Information: ‎Store in a cool, dry place. Once opened, keep in sealed container for freshness.
